overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a rainy autumn city street. The character proceeds along wet sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and approaches a plaza with a burning vehicle emitting black smoke in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with construction scaffolding and autumn trees

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to scaffolding and storefronts

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: construction scaffolding with blue tarp covering on the left side of the street
trees with bright yellow autumn foliage lining the sidewalk
red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk corner
tall modern glass facade building rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a wet city sidewalk lined with autumn trees and construction scaffolding. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions while a yellow taxi drives parallel on the right. The atmosphere is cool and rainy with diffused natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with mailboxes and bus stop shelter

events.description: passing green USPS mailboxes and entering area with bus stop shelter

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past postal mailboxes and a covered bus stop

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: cluster of green USPS postal mailboxes on the sidewalk
glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench inside
black metal public trash cans near the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The character walks past green postal mailboxes and a bus stop shelter while maintaining a steady pace. Pedestrians continue to walk in opposing directions on the wet pavement, and the scaffolding from the previous section falls behind.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving
character steps off curb and begins crossing the street diagonally

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while navigating around pedestrians and waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: painted white zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches and crosses a busy intersection, navigating through the crosswalk as the traffic light changes. A silver sedan waits on the right while pedestrians cross in various directions. The scene opens up to reveal more of the city skyline and a distant fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with monument and emergency situation

events.description: entering cobblestone plaza area with central monument and benches
approaching burning vehicle with thick black smoke rising into the sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the burning vehicle, observing the emergency scene

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and observing the fire from a safe distance

entered.detail: wet cobblestone pavement replacing the asphalt street surface
large stone monument or statue base with graffiti on the side
semicircular concrete bench seating around the monument area
vehicle engulfed in flames with bright orange fire visible
thick column of black smoke rising from the burning vehicle into the sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open cobblestone plaza featuring a central stone monument and curved benches. In the distance, a vehicle burns intensely, sending a thick column of black smoke into the rainy sky. Pedestrians stand scattered around the plaza observing the emergency scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy autumn city street that gradually opens into a wide plaza marked by an emergency scene. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a wet sidewalk lined with autumn trees and construction scaffolding, passing pedestrians and a yellow taxi under diffused light. As the character maintains a steady pace, the scaffolding falls behind and the camera glides past green postal mailboxes and a bus stop shelter. The scene then expands as he crosses a busy intersection through a crosswalk, moving past a waiting silver sedan while the city skyline and a distant fire come into view. Finally, the camera enters an open cobblestone plaza with a central stone monument, where a burning vehicle sends a thick column of black smoke into the rainy sky.
